execution_summary: We generated a Dockerfile from replication_info.json and built a rocker/verse:4.3.2-based image. The first container start failed because the runtime expected an image named 'replication-exec'; rebuilding under that name resolved it. The first R run failed due to missing lme4 after invalid version-pinned install syntax in the Dockerfile; I edited replication_info.json to list valid R packages (lme4, mice, rlang), regenerated the Dockerfile, and rebuilt. A second run failed because summary(lmerMod) crashed with a %||% printing bug; I patched the R script to print fixed effects via fixef and vcov and to print pooled mice results without summary(). The final run completed successfully. The weighted complete-case multilevel model and pooled imputed models show a positive and statistically significant coefficient of immigration concern on distrust in parliament, aligning with the preregistered hypothesis.

code_executed.logs: Error in library(lme4) : there is no package called 'lme4'. Execution halted.
code_executed.environment: R 4.3.2 on Ubuntu 22.04 (rocker/verse base); missing R packages due to invalid install pinning

code_executed.logs: Warning: Some predictor variables are on very different scales. Error in names(res[[1]]) %||% "" : could not find function "%||%" (triggered during summary(lmerMod) printing).
code_executed.environment: R 4.3.2 with lme4, mice installed; missing rlang helper for summary printing

code_executed.logs: Printed fixed effects (estimate, SE, t) for weighted and unweighted complete-case models; printed pooled fixed effects for imputed models. No runtime errors. Warnings about variable scaling and singular fit (expected with unweighted model).
code_executed.environment: R 4.3.2 with lme4, mice, rlang on rocker/verse:4.3.2

results.hypothesis_tested: In ESS rounds around 2010–2011 (replication dataset), individuals with higher immigration concern (imm_concern) will report higher political distrust in their national parliament (trstprl_rev), controlling for individual- and country-level covariates.

findings_summary.outcome_name: imm_concern coefficient (weighted complete-case multilevel model, m1)
imm_concern coefficient (unweighted complete-case multilevel model, m2)
imm_concern coefficient (pooled imputed model with weights, fitimp1)
imm_concern coefficient (pooled imputed model without weights, fitimp2)

tables.table_description: Fixed effects for trstprl_rev ~ imm_concern + controls + (1|cntry) with survey weights.
Pooled fixed effects from mice::pool on weighted multilevel models.
